attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCR.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
SCR.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT,
SCR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
CAST(SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE,
SCR.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,
SCR.SS_CD,
SCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SCR.NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SCR.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,
SCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SCR.NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SCR.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
SCR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SCR.NEW_RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
SCR.NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
SCR.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,
SCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
FROM   $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT_2  SCR
WHERE
SCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER()  OVER  (PARTITION BY SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE ORDER BY SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT 
NSFATNHT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
,NSFATNHT.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
,NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
,NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
,NSFATNHT.SS_CD
,CASE WHEN NSFATNHT.SS_CD ='QTC' THEN 'UO' ELSE 'BO' END AS GLOBAL_NAME
,NSFATNHT.SALES_REP_NUMBER
,NSFATNHT.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT
,NSFATNHT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,NSFATNHT.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
,CASE WHEN NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' THEN NSFATNHT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE NSFATNHT.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY END RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NSFATNHT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,NSFATNHT.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
,NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
FROM
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV NSFATNHT
WHERE 
((NSFATNHT.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888) AND NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O' )
OR 
NSFATNHT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =-999 
OR 
NSFATNHT.SALES_REP_NUMBER='UNKNOWN' 
OR 
NSFATNHT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'
)
AND NSFATNHT.SS_CD IN ('QTC','BV') 
AND
NSFATNHT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT')

SELECT * 
FROM 
(SELECT 
SCAR.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
,SCAR.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
,SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
,SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
,SCAR.SS_CD
,SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME 
,SCAR.SALES_REP_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN SCAR.SALES_REP_NUMBER ='UNKNOWN' THEN COALESCE(ESREP.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN' ) ELSE SCAR.SALES_REP_NUMBER END AS NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER
,SCAR.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT
,SCAR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CASE WHEN SCAR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =-999 THEN COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) ELSE SCAR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END AS NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SCAR.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
,SCAR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SCAR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  NEW_RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SCAR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,CASE WHEN SCAR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ='UNKNOWN' THEN COALESCE(ESCT.NAME,'UNKNOWN' ) ELSE SCAR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE END AS NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,SCAR.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
,SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
FROM 
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT_1  SCAR
LEFT JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESREP
ON ESREP.SALES_REP_ID =	SCAR.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT		
AND ESREP.GLOBAL_NAME =SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
ON EST.TERRITORY_ID =SCAR.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME =SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
ON 
SCAR.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT = ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID 
AND 
ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME=SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE
SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
 ) TEMP
WHERE 
TEMP.SALES_REP_NUMBER <> TEMP.NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER
OR TEMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY <> TEMP.NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
OR TEMP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE <> TEMP.NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
UNION ALL
SELECT * 
FROM 
(SELECT 
SCAR.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
,SCAR.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
,SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
,SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
,SCAR.SS_CD
,SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME 
,SCAR.SALES_REP_NUMBER
,COALESCE(ESREP.SALES_REP_NUMBER,SCAR.SALES_REP_NUMBER) NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER
,SCAR.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT
,SCAR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SCAR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SCAR.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
,SCAR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(SOLN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,SCAR.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) NEW_RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SCAR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,COALESCE(ESCT.NAME,SCAR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE) NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,SCAR.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
,SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
FROM 
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT_1  SCAR
LEFT JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESREP
ON ESREP.SALES_REP_ID =	SCAR.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT		
AND ESREP.GLOBAL_NAME =SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
ON EST.TERRITORY_ID =SCAR.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT
AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME =SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SOLN
ON 
SCAR.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =SOLN.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
AND SCAR.SS_CD =SOLN.SS_CODE
LEFT JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
ON 
SCAR.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT = ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID 
AND 
ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME=SCAR.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE
SCAR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O'
 ) TEMP
WHERE 
TEMP.SALES_REP_NUMBER <> TEMP.NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER
OR TEMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY <> TEMP.NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
OR TEMP.NEW_RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY <>TEMP.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
OR TEMP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE <> TEMP.NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
